description: CompositionLight green kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves and a round neck with a drawstring, and has embroidered stripes with appliquéd panel running vertically across the frontFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this stylish kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish front, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
